ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure with dynamic fields injected via hidden inputs. The location field is a text input with an associated hidden field for selection.

fields.question: Ethena does not allow the use of AI tools during interviews, including note takers, transcription tools, or recordings. Candidates must disclose any AI use during the interview process. Failure to comply may result in removal from the recruitment process.
options: I acknowledge that I have read and understand Ethena’s AI policy for interviews.

fields.question: Why are you interested in joining Ethena?
Please list your name pronunciation so our team can address you correctly.
This role will require a background check. This will take place once the offer has been extended. If you have any concerns, please let us know or note N/A.
Do you now, or will you in the future require VISA sponsorship to work in the United States? [If Canadian resident] Do you now, or in the future will you require a work permit to work in Canada?

Ethena is a remote-first organization and is currently hiring for candidates based in approved locations in the United States and Canada noted in the job description. If you are selected for this role, you must be able to work and reside in one of these approved locations for the duration of your employment. Please select which location you’ll be able to work and reside from, of Ethena’s approved locations, for the duration of your employment with Ethena.
Do you use AI in your role?
How have you used AI in your role?
How did you first hear about Ethena? If an Ethena team member brought you here, we'd love to know who so we can thank them, so please do give them a shoutout.
